case_title: CENTURY NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY vs. EDWARDS, LAMAR et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $168.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTURY NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, ANNETTE
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-27-1993, CONTINUED TO SEP-09-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE OF CONTINUED STATUS CONFERENCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION OF WAYNE HUNTER FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTURY NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, LAMAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CENTURY NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, ANNETTE $2,475.87 PRINCIPAL, $168.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,643.87

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTURY NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, LAMAR CAMPBELL, ANNETTE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-28-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-29-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-10-1993
